name: article-writing
tagline: Long-form writing skill (articles, guides, blog posts, newsletters) that enforces a distinctive voice and a banned-phrase/quality-gate.
verdict: Clear, well-scoped writing skill: explicit trigger, concrete banned-pattern list, structure guidance per content type, and a quality gate before delivery. Weak points: no negative-trigger/scope-exclusion guidance so it could misfire on short-form or non-prose tasks, the final deliverable's format/location is never explicitly defined, and there is no version.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion text anywhere despite a broad long-form-writing scope (blog, essays, guides, newsletters).
Quality Gate lists editorial criteria but never states the deliverable's format or location (file vs chat, sections).
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill (frontmatter, line 1).
